banner.title: Start organizing your collection today
banner.description: Scan your first cards, build your structure, and start following prices with Spellvault.

items.title: What is Spellvault?
items.description: Spellvault is an app for scanning Magic cards, managing collections, and tracking prices. It gives collectors, stores, and players one place to manage inventory and market value.

items.title: How does the Spellvault scanner work?
items.description: Open the scanner, point it at the card, and Spellvault identifies the reference so you can add it to your collection. After that you can complete details like copies, binder, condition, or tags.

items.title: Can I organize my collection by binders, decks, or boxes?
items.description: Yes. Spellvault lets you structure your collection the way you already think about it in real life: binders, decks, boxes, sell lists, or any grouping that helps you find cards quickly.

items.title: Does Spellvault track both individual cards and total collection value?
items.description: Yes. You can view the value of each card and also the total value of the collection so you understand how your portfolio changes over time.

items.title: Can I use it for buying, selling, or trading?
items.description: Yes. Spellvault helps you understand what you own, what you are missing, what is moving, and which copies are ready to trade or sell.

items.title: Who is Spellvault for?
items.description: Spellvault is built for MTG collectors, competitive players, stores, sellers, and anyone who wants real control over their cards and market value.

items.title: Spellvault or Spell Vault?
items.description: The official name is Spellvault. Sometimes you may see it written as Spell Vault, but both refer to the same platform.

items.title: Can I cancel my subscription at any time?
items.description: Yes. You can cancel your subscription at any time from your account, with no lock-in or hidden fees.
